titleStmt.title: SII 8.488: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 488. (A.R. No. 189 of 1903). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE FIRST PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE, RIGHT OF ENTRANCE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samarasamadhigatapañcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaleśvara cālukyakulabhūṣaṇa val labha godāvarī tīrakanuppārrupuravarādhīśvara karavāḷabhairava śrīmat
śapādārādhaka parabalasādhaka prāptasamastavidyādharabhūṣaṇa śrīmatmahāmaṇḍaleśara ghaṭṭidevama hārājanen śrīrājarājade varkku yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu Āḷu
rukkāḷattiuṭaiyār tevatānakkuṭimakka(ḷ)ḷil Ūranattūrveḷānum viḻupparaiyarum koṉpākkattuirukkaiveḷānum cotiveḷānum kaṇṇainallūr viḻupparaiyanu
ti Irappakuṭiyāṉum tevakaḷcotiveḷānum pokaiyil Irā jentira ve(ḷ)ḷānum virarāje veḷāṉum puttūr Ūromum neṭuṅkaṇ Ūromum nelvāyil Ūromum
ñceri Ūromum tevatāṉattu Ūrkaḷukkuc camaittu Āḷuṭaiyār tirukkāḷattiuṭaiyār koyilile tiruvāṉit tirunāḷ Eḻuntaruḷuvikka tevar kaṭṭiyatevarāṉa yātavarājade varpakka
koṇṭu poliyūṭṭākak koṇṭa kācu nūṟu Ikkācu nūṟukkum Eṅkaḷ kaiyiṟ vārattile tiuṭaiyāṉkālāl koṉpākkam nellu nūṟu vaṭṭiyum Ūrnellu nūṟuvaṭṭiyum
kaṇṇanallūr nellu Eḻupattañcu vaṭṭiyum kaṇṇappacceri nellu Irupattañcu vaṭṭiyum nellu nūṟu vaṭṭiyum neṭuṅkaṇum puttūrum nelvāyilum nellu nūṟu vaṭṭiyum
lu Aiññūṟu vaṭṭiyum Itil pūcikkum nampimārkku nellu Aypatu vaṭṭiyum paricārakarkku nellu Aypatu vaṭṭiyum nikki nellu nāṉūṟu vaṭṭiyum śrīpaṇṭārattile nāṅkaḷum Eṅka
ḷ vaṟkattārum Aḷakkakkaṭavomānom . Intat taṉma miṟakkuvāṉ keṅkaikkaraiyiṟ kurāṟpacuk kuttināṉ pāvattil viḻuvom Eṅkaḷ vaṅśa maṟu ve
ḻam piriyāc caḷukki tiṇṭerk kaṭṭi yātavarkoṉ tirukkāḷattic civaṉārk kāṉittiru nāṭ cey cāruṅ kācu poliyūṭṭiṉukkut tarakkoṇ ṭematu kuṭivāran taṉṉi
kātal Ārātakaṟku ṉūṟu vaṭṭi meṅkulattor melun tiṟampāvaṇṇaṅ ko yarvaḻi nirkuṭittal matto
ttūr puttūr neṭuṅka ṇṇappacceri yūromey
Digital edition of SII 8.488 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
